Title
This item is a deferred, subscription, or recurring purchase. By continuing, I agree to the cancellation policy and authorize you to charge my payment method at the prices, frequency and dates listed on this page until my order is fulfilled or I cancel, if permitted.

Unrecorded + Annemieke Boots Stoneware Pitcher is backordered and will ship as soon as it is back in stock.

Pickup available at Unrecorded Store Nº1

Usually ready in 24 hours
Description

This is a demo store. Products are for purchase from Unrecorded

This wheel thrown pitcher is handmade by Dutch ceramic artist Annemieke Boots. Made of stoneware and finished with a pebble white glaze developed from scratch by Annemieke.

This pitcher is part of a unique series of handmade ceramics made in collaboration with Annemieke Boots. The series is limited to 50 pieces.

Size: Ø 8,5 cm x height 15 cm
Materials & Care

Our cotton is grown on soil that is free of toxic pesticides and fertilizers. Our fabric is dyed and finished without the use of heavy metals or allergenic disperse dyes.

- Wash at 30 degrees with similar colours
- Lay flat to dry
- Iron on the inside if necessary
Shipping

- To DE/FR/BE/LU/AT/DK/UK €9 (free above €100)
- To rest of EU €15 (free above €150)
- To rest of Europe €25 (free above €200)
- To rest of World €35 (free above €300)

Salt Yard has a 14-day return policy: any unwanted items needs to be shipped within 14 days of receipt. After the product is returned you will be refunded.Salt Yard will issue a full refund including the original shipping cost. The return shipping fee will not be refunded.
